response.overview: As the sunny season returns, Edmond and Lucy eagerly head outside to their favorite playground. Follow them on a journey of exploration, learning, and playing in the heart of the woods!  This brand-new summer movie is a collection of 4 episodes from the series Edmond and Lucy with exclusive images to tie the episodes together! To create a truly immersive big screen experience, the director, François Narboux, has reimagined the staging, adapting every frame into a cinemascope format.
response.title: Edmond and Lucy's Sunny Days
